metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students develop advanced automotive diagnostic and repair skills covering electrical systems, transmission service, engine diagnostics, and emerging hybrid and electric vehicle technology. This course prepares students for ASE certification and careers in modern automotive service.
metadata.general_description: Advanced diagnostics, transmission systems, electrical systems, and hybrid/EV technology.

big_ideas.statement: Modern vehicles integrate mechanical, electrical, and computer systems requiring systematic diagnosis and repair
big_ideas.elaboration: Technicians must understand how systems interact to diagnose problems and implement effective solutions.

big_ideas.statement: Diagnostic equipment and procedures enable accurate identification of vehicle problems
big_ideas.elaboration: Modern diagnostics use computer interfaces and specialized tools to identify issues efficiently.

big_ideas.statement: Hybrid and electric vehicle technology is transforming automotive service with new systems and approaches
big_ideas.elaboration: New powertrain technologies require updated knowledge and safety procedures from service technicians.

big_ideas.statement: Professional automotive service requires safety consciousness, quality standards, and customer communication
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful automotive careers combine technical expertise with professionalism and customer service.

competencies.raw: Design diagnostic procedures for automotive problems
i_can_statements: I can develop systematic diagnostic approaches
I can plan testing procedures
I can design verification steps
I can document diagnostic results

competencies.raw: Design repair strategies and technical solutions
i_can_statements: I can plan repair approaches
I can select appropriate techniques
I can design quality assurance steps
I can plan testing and verification
I can develop preventive maintenance plans
I can plan service intervals
I can design inspection procedures
I can create service documentation
I can identify safety hazards
I can develop safety procedures
I can plan for high-voltage systems
I can ensure customer and technician safety

competencies.raw: Apply diagnostic techniques and equipment use
i_can_statements: I can use diagnostic scanning tools
I can interpret diagnostic trouble codes
I can perform electrical testing
I can use specialized diagnostic equipment

competencies.raw: Apply transmission service and repair skills
i_can_statements: I can perform transmission fluid service
I can diagnose transmission problems
I can execute transmission repairs
I can test and verify transmission function

competencies.raw: Apply electrical system diagnosis and repair
i_can_statements: I can diagnose electrical problems
I can repair electrical systems
I can test electrical components
I can install electrical systems

competencies.raw: Apply hybrid and electric vehicle service procedures
i_can_statements: I can diagnose HEV systems safely
I can service hybrid components
I can work with high-voltage systems safely
I can maintain EV charging systems

competencies.raw: Use diagnostic scanning and computer tools
i_can_statements: I can operate OBD scanners
I can use manufacturer diagnostic systems
I can interpret digital information
I can update diagnostic software
I can operate lift and hoisting equipment
I can use specialized service tools
I can operate measuring equipment
I can use testing and charging equipment

competencies.raw: Use technology for information and documentation
i_can_statements: I can access service manuals and information
I can use digital work order systems
I can document work and repairs
I can communicate with customers digitally

competencies.raw: Use hybrid and electric vehicle diagnostic systems
i_can_statements: I can operate HEV diagnostic tools
I can interpret HEV system data
I can use EV-specific equipment
I can follow HEV safety protocols
